summary: OWASP A01 Final Batch Security Verification COMPLETE - All 27 tests passed. Final 4 route files (analytics.py, dashboard.py, notifications.py, student_reports.py) verified to use tenant-isolated database connections via get_tenant_db_for_user dependency. Complete multi-tenant security refactor confirmed.

authentication.notes: Super admin login works correctly, invalid credentials rejected (401)

analytics_tenant_isolation.notes: All endpoints return 403 for super_admin without tenant context - properly secured

dashboard_tenant_isolation.notes: All endpoints return 403 for super_admin without tenant context - properly secured

notifications_tenant_isolation.notes: All endpoints return 403 for super_admin without tenant context - properly secured

student_reports_tenant_isolation.notes: All endpoints return 403 for super_admin without tenant context - properly secured

unauthenticated_access_blocked.notes: All endpoints return 401 for unauthenticated requests

owasp_a01_broken_access_control.issue: Route files were using global database connection instead of tenant-isolated connections
owasp_a01_broken_access_control.fix: All 18 route files now use get_tenant_db_for_user dependency
owasp_a01_broken_access_control.verification_method: Super admin without tenant code in JWT correctly receives 403 error with message 'This endpoint requires tenant context'

critical_code_review_comments: PASS: analytics.py correctly uses get_tenant_db_for_user from utils.auth
PASS: dashboard.py correctly uses get_tenant_db_for_user from utils.auth
PASS: notifications.py correctly uses get_tenant_db_for_user from utils.auth
PASS: student_reports.py correctly uses get_tenant_db_for_user from utils.auth
PASS: All endpoints properly return tenant_db and current_user tuple
PASS: Super admins without tenant context are blocked from tenant-isolated routes (403)
PASS: Complete OWASP A01 fix verified across all 18 route files
context_for_next_testing_agent: OWASP A01 security fix COMPLETE. All 18 route files now use get_tenant_db_for_user for tenant isolation. This includes the final 4 files (analytics.py, dashboard.py, notifications.py, student_reports.py) refactored in this session. Super admin accounts without tenant context correctly receive 403 errors on all tenant-isolated endpoints. Complete multi-tenant security isolation verified.
